auth.title: MY PURCHASE
auth.subtitle: AI-powered grocery & expense manager
auth.footer: Your data is stored privately in your own Google Drive account

list.placeholder: What do you need to buy?

scan.title: Upload Receipt
scan.subtitle: Choose purchase type
scan.tip_desc: If the receipt is long, take 2 or 3 close-up photos. The AI will merge them.
scan.instructions_camera: Frame the receipt within the box

modals.logout_confirm: Log out? Local access will be cleared.
modals.link_list_desc: Active list detected. The AI will automatically check off found items.

ai.prompt:
Act as an expert shopping receipt data extractor.
      
      IMPORTANT CONTINUITY RULE:
      If you receive MULTIPLE IMAGES, they are parts of a SINGLE RECEIPT (a long receipt photographed in chunks). 
      - Merge all information into a single JSON object.
      - DO NOT DUPLICATE products if they appear in the overlap of photos.
      - Sum subtotals to verify the final total.

      EXPECTED PRODUCTS LIST: [{{lista}}].
      CURRENT DATE: {{fecha}}.

      CRITICAL RULES:
      1. "comercio": Must be a STRING (e.g., "WALMART"). Do not use long legal names, only the known trade name.
      2. "total": The final amount paid on the receipt.
      3. "nombre_base": Use the name from the EXPECTED PRODUCTS LIST if the receipt item matches semantically.

      STRICT JSON FORMAT:
      {
        "comercio": "string",
        "fecha": "DD/MM/AAAA",
        "total": number,
        "productos": [
          { "cantidad": number, "nombre_ticket": "string", "nombre_base": "string", "subtotal": number }
        ]
      }

help.home_desc: Here you can see how much you've spent this month. Tap the spend card to see a breakdown by category.
help.nav_desc: Use the bottom bar to move around: Home, the (+) button to upload receipts, and List for your pending items.
help.scanner_desc: Choose the store type. If the receipt is long, take several photos in parts; the AI will merge them all!
help.list_desc: Note down what you need. When scanning a receipt, the app will automatically check off what it finds.
help.settings_desc: In the top gear icon, you can export your expenses to Excel or watch this tutorial again.
